AddCaseComment.description: Grants permission to add a comment to a support case

CheckCasePermission.description: Grants permission to verify whether the caller has the permissions to perform support case operations

CompleteMultipartUpload.description: Grants permission to complete a multipart file upload to a support case

CreateCase.description: Grants permission to create a support case

CreateS3CLIUploadCommand.description: Grants permission to create a cli command to allow a file upload to a support case

CreateS3DownloadUrl.description: Grants permission to download a file from a support case

GetCase.description: Grants permission to describe a support case in your account

GetCasePermission.description: Grants permission to verify whether the caller has the permissions to perform support case operations

GetCases.description: Grants permission to list the support cases in your account

GetUICache.description: Grants permission to retrieve cached case user data for use in the Console

ListTagsForCase.description: Grants permission to list tags on a support case

StartMultipartUpload.description: Grants permission to start a multipart file upload to a support case

TagCase.description: Grants permission to add a tag on a support case

UntagCase.description: Grants permission to remove a tag on a support case

UpdateCase.description: Grants permission to update a support case

UpdateCaseStatus.description: Grants permission to update a support case status

UpdateMultipartUpload.description: Grants permission to update a multipart file upload to a support case

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by tag keys that are passed in the request
